# Maison Noir

> A luxury interior architecture studio based in Dehradun, Uttarakhand — designing residential, hospitality, and commercial interiors of quiet luxury across the Himalayan foothills and India since 2009.

Maison Noir is led by founder Ananya Rawat. The studio is known for slow, intentional design rooted in local materials — Kumaoni stone, deodar wood, and brass — and a restrained editorial aesthetic shaped by mountain light.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Studio overview, featured projects, services, process, and visit information.

## Services
- Luxury Residential Design
- Modern Commercial Spaces
- Hospitality & Boutique Hotels
- Interior Architecture & Renovation

## Studio
- Location: 42 Rajpur Road, Hathibarkala Estate, Dehradun, Uttarakhand 248001, India
- Hours: Mon–Fri 10:00–19:00 IST · Sat by appointment · Sun closed
- Email: studio@maisonnoir.in
- Founded: 2009
